sql_array: CREATE TABLE teams(    `id` UInt32,    `team_name` String,    `score` UInt32) Engine = Memory;
INSERT INTO teams VALUES (1, 'Team A', 300), (2, 'Team B', 450), (3, 'Team A', 350), (4, 'Team C', 450);
SELECT team_name, score,        dense_rank() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) AS team_rank FROM teams;
UPDATE teams SET score = score + 100 WHERE team_name = 'Team C';
SELECT team_name, score,        dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY team_name ORDER BY score DESC) AS team_rank FROM teams;
